title: Telehealth / video visit request
goal: Ask whether you can do a video (telehealth) visit instead of coming in, and book one if possible.
hypothesis: Does the agent accurately represent whether telehealth is offered, or hallucinate a service/booking that may not exist?
opening_line: Hi, I was wondering if I could do a video visit instead of coming in person — do you offer telehealth?
wrap_up_when: you learn whether telehealth is available and, if so, how to book it
